title: Western Influences
questions: How can one country influence another country? How does television influence a society? How does popular culture affect a country?
What is the "west?" What countries are included? Is the west a single idea or made up of many different cultures?
What things are considered western influences in: Fashion? Politics? Economics? Food? Music? Movies?
How can a country embrace western ideas? How can they resist those influences? What are some examples in your country? Should countries remain open to western influence? Why or why not?
How can a country adopt western practices and still remain unique? Is your country losing its identity or traditional values? Why or why not?
